props.ChoiceText: Whatever bound you to home broke, and the road ahead opened by necessity rather than hope.
props.ChoiceBio: You entered adolescence uprooted, with survival and movement shaping your first real decisions.

0.TransitionText: Because you entered adolescence uprooted, with survival and movement shaping your first real decisions, the first turn of your life led not upward but into plain hardship.

1.TransitionText: Because you entered adolescence uprooted, with survival and movement shaping your first real decisions, you were pushed away from settled life and toward the harsher education of the wild.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Hunter, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because you entered adolescence uprooted, with survival and movement shaping your first real decisions, the easiest road left open to you was the crooked one.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Criminal, but you may remain on your current path instead.
